name: New Hope Liuhe Co., Ltd.
summary: New Hope Liuhe Co., Ltd., together with its subsidiaries, engages in feed, breeding, meat products, and financial investment businesses in China, Vietnam, the Philippines, Bangladesh, Indonesia, Sri Lanka, Kampuchea, Singapore, Egypt, and internationally. It offers meat products, such as smoked duck breast and roasted duck legs; and other products. The company also provides ham sausages under the Meihao brand; poultry feed and pig feed under the Liuhe brand; poultry feed and aquatic feed under the Guoxiong and Jiahao brand names; and chilled fresh pork under the Qianxihe brand. In addition, it offers financial guarantee services for farmers. The company was formerly known as Sichuan New Hope Agribusiness Co., Ltd. New Hope Liuhe Co., Ltd. was founded in 1998 and is based in Chengdu, China.
